auth.tagline: Log in and manage your customer services in Swivo — your personal guide to car washing delivered to your door!
auth.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number

home.hint: Tap the button above to change your status and start receiving orders.
home.offlineSub: Press the button above to start receiving orders

ASSIGNED.title: Ready to start?
ASSIGNED.desc: When ready, tap "On My Way" to notify the customer and head to the location.

ON_THE_WAY.title: Arrived at customer location?
ON_THE_WAY.desc: Verify the car details and tap "Start Wash" when ready.

ARRIVED.title: Let's start washing now
ARRIVED.desc: Make sure all washing tools are ready, then begin immediately.

STARTED.title: Washing the car ✨
STARTED.desc: Ensure quality and cleanliness. Then tap "Finish Wash".

COMPLETED.title: Order Complete ✨
COMPLETED.desc: Service finished successfully. Please send the wash results to the customer.

camera.permissionMsg: The app needs camera permission to capture proof photos
camera.proofHint: Capture up to 4 photos — at least 1 required

cancel.confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel? This action cannot be undone.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.footer: For inquiries about any clause, contact the support team

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By using the Tamam Biker app, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you disagree with any part, you are not permitted to use the app.

sections.title: 2. Nature of Service
sections.body: Tamam Biker is a platform connecting car wash service providers with customers. As an independent biker, you are not an employee of Tamam and bear responsibility for the quality and safety of service delivery.

sections.title: 3. Earnings & Payments
sections.body: Your earnings are calculated at 90% of each completed order's value. Withdrawal requests are processed within two business days. Tamam reserves the right to adjust commission rates with prior notice.

sections.title: 4. Professional Obligations
sections.body: The biker must arrive on time, use appropriate equipment, protect customer property, and act professionally at all times.

sections.title: 5. Order Cancellations
sections.body: Cancellations are only permitted in exceptional cases. Repeated cancellations may affect your rating and could result in account suspension.

sections.title: 6. Privacy & Data Protection
sections.body: We are committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with our adopted privacy policy. Your data will not be shared with third parties except with your consent or as required by law.

sections.title: 7. Account Termination
sections.body: Tamam has the right to suspend or terminate your account in case of a violation of these terms. You have the right to close your account at any time by contacting technical support.
